rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"React hooks (useCallback, useEffect, etc.) cannot be placed after an early-return guard; move all hook calls before any conditional return to satisfy react-hooks/rules-of-hooks.","scope":"src/components/notifications/toast.tsx"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Files produced by @kody decompose introduce lint errors (unused imports, missing return types, barrel re-exports) that must be fixed before pipeline merge — generated code is not lint-clean by default","scope":"@kody decompose pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a component has an early no-op return, all useCallback/useEffect calls must precede it even if they appear logically unnecessary — the call site, not the function body, determines the rule violat","scope":"React Hooks"}]}
